hooks.command: echo "Context: today is $(date +%F), current time is $(date +%H:%M %Z)"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('command',''); danger=['rm -rf /','DROP TABLE','truncate /','mkfs ',':(){:|:&};:']; found=[p for p in danger if p in cmd]; sys.exit(2) if found else sys.exit(0)"
git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && claude -p 'Review the last code change for correctness and bugs. One paragraph max, be direct.' --max-turns 2 2>/dev/null || true
